gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics and health checks.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and the greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and health metrics accurate and up to date.
gist.visual_concept: The automated bot represented by the monitor robot watering plants in the greenhouse, while Polly the bee checks off a list on a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a lime green (#ecf874) code-plant in a digital greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking off daily metrics. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
